query:
SELECT 
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.value, '$.behaviorId')) as behaviorId,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.value, '$.proofType')) as proofType,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.value, '$.endpoint')) as endpoint,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.value, '$.riskLevel')) as riskLevel
FROM analyses a,
JSON_TABLE(a.layer2Json->'$.proofTargets', '$[*]' COLUMNS (value JSON PATH '$')) pt
WHERE a.id = 30002
ORDER BY proofType;
